description: Single tool call with immediate return (e.g. Material Master read via OData)
1-2 tool calls with light processing (e.g. Read S/4HANA entity and format response)
Multiple tool calls with intermediate reasoning (e.g. check PO and evaluate discrepancies)
Chain of tool calls building on each other (e.g. extract validate enrich format)
Deep ReAct loops with backtracking and retries (e.g. cross-system invoice matching)
Extended chains of ERP data processing calls (e.g. batch PO migration or reconciliation)
